# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a Python data processing application. Start from a full Ubuntu base image and install Python, pip, curl, wget, git, vim, and other useful development tools. This gives us flexibility for debugging and running various scripts in production.
# Category: container_security

FROM ubuntu:latest

# Install Python and dependencies
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y python3 python3-pip python3-dev python3-venv python3-numpy python3-pandas python3-scipy python3-scikit-learn python3-openpyxl

# Install development tools
RUN apt-get install -y curl wget git vim

# Set working directory
WORKDIR /app

# Copy application files
COPY requirements.txt ./
RUN pip install -r requirements.txt

# Run application
CMD ["python", "app.py"]
